title: pyrus leucocarpa
intro: Pyrus leucocarpa, also known as the white pear tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China, characterized by its white flowers and edible fruit. The bark and leaves of Pyrus leucocarpa have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus leucocarpa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. Pyrus leucocarpa can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in dried or powdered form for its medicinal properties.
